data.content:
All files look correct. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Centralized all versions in `Directory.Build.props`** — no more hardcoded versions in individual `.csproj` files. Every project now references MSBuild properties.

**Bumped packages to latest stable:**
| Package | Before | After |
|---------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 | **10.0.6** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Logging | 9.0.0 | **10.0.6** |
| Azure.Storage.Blobs | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 | **12.27.0** |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | 8.0.1 | **10.0.6** |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | 1.15.0 | **1.15.3** |
| Mvc.NewtonsoftJson (net8.0) | 8.0.11 | **8.0.26** |

**Eliminated version drift** — Legacy's hardcoded `Azure.Storage.Blobs` and `System.Text.Json` now use the same shared properties as every other project. `Common.props` logging version also uses `$(LoggingVersion)` instead of a hardcoded value.
